rawAssistant: Tomorrow's road trip won't be easy without a sturdy lantern. I can tighten one for you by mid-morning, but don't say I didn't warn you – the winds have been fierce lately. Make sure to check your gear and the old lantern itself before setting out; loose parts or worn-out wicks could leave you in the dark, quite literally.
